basic_details.job_title: State Ayush Society Chandigarh Yoga Instructor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: State Ayush Society Chandigarh Yoga Instructor Notification 2026 has been released on 07 May 2026 on the official website State Ayush Society Chandigarh. Has been announced through the State Ayush Society Chandigarh Yoga Instructor Recruitment 2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.details: Yoga Instructor : 10th, 10+2, Graduation, Master's degree or any other relevant qualification.

salary_details.details: Please refer to the official notification for salary details.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for State Ayush Society Chandigarh Yoga Instructor Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.chandigarh.gov.in, www.gcyeh.edu.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 22-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Yoga Instructor post?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of the application form is 22nd May 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the Yoga Instructor (Part Time) post is offline. Candidates need to download the form and submit it by hand or post.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Yoga Instructor post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification is 10th pass, but candidates with 10+2, Graduation, Master's degree, or any other relevant qualification are also eligible.

faq.question: Q4. What is the selection process for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will include an Interview and a Skill Test for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q5. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official websites: www.chandigarh.gov.in and www.gcyeh.edu.in.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for the Yoga Instructor position?
faq.answer: The position of Yoga Instructor (Part Time) is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q7. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number is E.O. 568701/NAM, UT, Chd./2026/81310.

faq.question: Q8. What is the official website for State Ayush Society Chandigarh?
faq.answer: The official websites are www.chandigarh.gov.in and www.gcyeh.edu.in.

faq.question: Q9. When did the application form download start?
faq.answer: The application form download started on 8th May 2026.
